title: 3D X-ray microscopy and SEM of Zospeum troglobalcanicum and allied species
author: Jochum, Adrienne
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Light microscopic images of full-bodied Zospeum Bourguignat, 1856 from Njeguši, St John's cave. A–B. Zospeum kolbae Jochum, Inäbnit, Kneubühler & Ruthensteiner sp. nov. (NMBE 571122– 571123), individuals assessed by DNA sequencing with sigmoid intestine showing through shells (shells were destroyed post imaging for tissue extraction). A. Holotype (NMBE 571122), shell of aliquot, aperture, and aperture facing left view. B. Paratype (NMBE 571123), shell of aliquot, aperture, and aperture facing left view. C. Undescribed Zospeum sp. 1 (NMBE
showing all perspectives. D–E. Undescribed Zospeum sp. 1 (NMBE 577053/
